name: plotly-client-electron
description: Electron wrapper for the plotly-client Rust server
author: Chickadee

scripts.dev: npm run build:rust && npm run prepare:bin && npm run start
scripts.pack: npm run build:rust && npm run prepare:bin && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:rust && npm run prepare:bin && electron-builder
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:rust && npm run prepare:bin && electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:rust && npm run prepare:bin && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:rust && npm run prepare:bin && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
